title: Steady and self similar full Euler flow
summary:
We consider solutions to the full (non-isentropic) two-dimensional Euler
equations that are constant in time and along rays emanating from the origin.
We prove that for a polytropic equation of state, entropy admissible solutions
in $L^\infty$ with non-vanishing velocity, density, and internal energy must be
$BV$. Moreover, we obtain some results concerning the structure of such
solutions.

title: Some Remarks on Nonlinear Hyperbolic Equations
comment: 15 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1207.7063
summary:
Here a mixed problem for a nonlinear hyperbolic equation with Neumann
boundary value condition is investigated, and a priori estimations for the
possible solutions of the considered problem are obtained. These results
demonstrate that any solution of this problem possess certain smoothness
properties.
